title: Potsdam M 1723/ M1740 musket for Vic's point blank
description: A content pack for Vic's point blank mod that adds the Infantriegewehr Potsdam M1723/ M1740. Survival friendly.
body:
The Potsdam M 1723/ M1740 Musket pack is a contant pack that adds the 18th century Infantriegewehr Potsdam M1723/ M1740 to Minecraft with a high quality model and animations. Sound assets from Kvasirma_s Renaissance Era Pack were used, as well as vanilla Minecraft and Battlefield 1 sound effects. 

The contant pack is survival friendly due to easy crafting recipes: 
- Potsdam M 1723/ M1740 Musket:

![crafting recipe for the Musket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a054ad059e5f1e1e32b07a67686597b9990b35c.png)

- M 1723/ M1740 .78 Paper Bullet: 

![crafting recipe for the musket paper bullets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b36ea1de9c048cc72d6318796b75e4a36d12ca3a.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/76zftwghe4U" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

NOTE - To install, locate the instance's folder and create a new folder inside of it. Call it "pointblank". Then drag and drop the content pack inside and you are ready to boot up the game.
